boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the security operator execute the incident-response action now? Focus: public breach notification draft.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records close exact action boundary before execution
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No narrow source-record defect remains open before execution
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Current legal/security approval and final scope match confirmed

final_answer: Action allowed. The controlling source and boundary records confirm the exact action boundary is closed with actor, scope, date, and dependency matching. Policy permits execution only when current source records close the exact requested action boundary. No open defect remains in this packet. The security operator may proceed with the public breach notification draft.
